location.name: Fajã dos Padres
location.summary: A quiet coastal estate below towering cliffs, reached by cable car or boat.
location.imageAlt: Fajã dos Padres coast below cliffs in Madeira

article.intro: Fajã dos Padres is a sheltered strip of coast below Madeira’s high southern cliffs.
article.history: Its unusual location beneath the cliffs supported cultivation and a small coastal settlement over many generations.
highlights: A dramatic cable-car approach beneath cliffs
A slower alternative to the busier south-coast resorts
article.practicalTip: Check cable-car operating times before travelling, particularly outside the main season.
